patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (contact +1 310 556 1256). Key active problems documented include mixed dyslipidemia (primary, 06/30/2023), essential hypertension, and postoperative/unspecified anemia (06/30/2023). A prior diagnosis of hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus is recorded (01/12/2021). Major recent procedure: COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Notable labs: 07/03/2023 lipid abnormalities (Triglycerides 158 H, VLDL 32 H), iron studies with low serum iron 41 L and low iron saturation 15 L with elevated ferritin 266.8 H, eGFR CKD-EPI 58 L. Functional limitations include difficulty walking. Multiple care teams documented across facilities including Hand HA MD (Singing River) and Hershey CL MD (Piedmont). Conflicting demographic entries (DOB and legal sex) and smoking history are present in source documents.
